kill_fact: No kill. The catalyst survives independent verification: DURAVYU's Phase 3 LUGANO wet-AMD topline is genuinely LIVE, dated, and UNFIRED (no topline release exists as of verification; trial fully enrolled, endpoint window passed), the DSMC reviewed masked SAFETY only so the efficacy non-inferiority outcome remains a true open binary, and the downside is backstopped by a REAL cash floor ($223M, runway into Q4 2027, no going-concern, no forced ATM/offering before the data). The spread has NOT closed (live ~$13-14.50 vs ~$37.50 win target). The load-bearing flaws are the DATE and the SOFTNESS of the floor.
corrections: DATE: Catalyst-Watch hard date 2026-07-31 is not a company-stated date and is ~2-4 weeks EARLY. Primary guidance: 5/14/2026 DSMC release 'topline data beginning in mid-2026'; June 2026 update has LUGANO topline on track 'beginning in August 2026,' LUCIA ~2 months later. Treat the milestone as a several-week August 2026 window, not 7/31. SHARE COUNT: Q1 2026 10-Q weighted-avg shares ~86.0M (not 83.8M), so net cash is ~$2.59/share. FLOOR is event-specific, NOT a deal-break price: $5.50 is ~2.1x net cash crediting non-contractual pipeline/platform optionality; on a clean LUGANO efficacy wipe the realistic floor is closer to bare net cash (~$3) than $5.50, since a miss partly discredits the LUCIA/DME optionality the floor banks on, and could overshoot below intraday. STRUCTURE: two-leg binary (LUGANO then LUCIA ~2mo later); a LUGANO-win/LUCIA-miss split is a live un-hedged scenario the headline asymmetry understates.
evidence: EyePoint press release, 2026-05-14 (GlobeNewswire/IR): 'Third Consecutive Positive DSMC Recommendation for Phase 3 Wet AMD Trials for DURAVYU, Building Confidence Ahead of Mid-2026 Topline Data' — DSMC reviewed masked SAFETY data only (efficacy unreviewed); LUGANO topline on track for mid-2026, LUCIA to follow shortly after.

EyePoint Q1 2026 results, GlobeNewswire/8-K 2026-05-06 (SEC EDGAR CIK 0001314102): $223M cash & investments as of 3/31/2026 ($77.7M cash + $144.8M marketable securities), down from $306M at 12/31/2025; runway into Q4 2027 'beyond key Phase 3 wet AMD milestones'; weighted-avg shares ~86.0M; no ATM/offering/going-concern language.

EyePoint Form 10-Q period ended 2026-03-31 (SEC EDGAR, accession 000119312526211870, eypt-20260331.htm): confirms $223M cash/investments, no going-concern qualification, funded into Q4 2027 — verifies the real (but non-contractual) cash floor and absence of forced dilution before the readout.

June 2026 corporate update coverage (Modern Retina / The Globe and Mail): LUGANO topline on track 'beginning in August' 2026 with LUCIA ~2 months later; ~432-pt LUGANO vs 2mg aflibercept non-inferiority design fully enrolled; EYPT ~$12-14.50 in June 2026 — trial unfired, spread to ~$37.50 still open.
